title: The Mist of Bravora
author: OpenAI
description: In the mist-choked forests of Bravora, travellers vanish and ghost lights dance between the trees. You must uncover the truth before the Veil tears open.

woodsman_knife.name: Woodsman's Knife
woodsman_knife.description: A sturdy working blade, better for survival than glory.

lantern_charm.name: Lantern Charm
lantern_charm.description: A small silver token etched with warding symbols against restless spirits.

healing_herbs.name: Healing Herbs
healing_herbs.description: A fragrant bundle of mountain herbs. Restores 15 health when used.

godstone_shard.name: Godstone Shard
godstone_shard.description: A fractured piece of black godstone that hums faintly near thin places in the Veil.

scene_001.title: The Road into Bravora
scene_001.text: The last village lies behind you. Ahead, the forest road bends into the Cinturao de Bruma, the Belt of Mist. Three merchants have vanished in as many weeks. The villagers speak of lanterns moving where no hands carry them, and of voices calling loved ones by name from deep among the trees.

imagePrompt.subject: Rutted dirt road curving into a wall of grey-white mist between dense dark pines at dusk, no figures

choices.text: Search the roadside shrine before entering the forest
Follow the wagon tracks straight into the mist

scene_002.title: The Shrine of Saint Lavrento
scene_002.text: Half-swallowed by moss and ivy, the little roadside shrine still holds offerings: candle stubs, dried flowers, and a forgotten satchel tucked behind the stone. Someone left in a hurry.

imagePrompt.subject: Stone roadside shrine half-buried in ivy, burnt-down candle stubs and wilted dried flowers on the ledge, a worn leather satchel visible behind the base

choices.text: Take the path into the trees

scene_003.title: Ghost Lights
scene_003.text: The mist thickens until the trees are pale pillars in the gloom. Ahead, a lantern glimmers between the trunks. It sways gently, though there is no wind. Then another appears. And another.

imagePrompt.subject: Three faintly glowing points of amber light suspended between pale tree trunks in thick white mist, no visible source or chain

choices.text: Ignore them and search for the missing caravan

scene_004.title: The Weeping Spirit
scene_004.text: The lanterns gather in a clearing around the shape of a kneeling woman. When she lifts her face, it is hollow-eyed and streaked with black tears. She rises without bending her knees and drifts toward you with a sound like someone sobbing under water.

imagePrompt.subject: Translucent female figure rising rigidly from a forest clearing floor, face hollow-socketed with black tear streaks, lanterns circling at shoulder height

choices.text: Hold up the lantern charm and speak a warding prayer
choices.conditionFailMessage: You have nothing to ward the spirit with.

choices.text: Fight through it with your blade
choices.conditionFailMessage: You need a weapon to stand your ground.

scene_005.title: The Broken Caravan
scene_005.text: You find the missing caravan where the road disappears beneath roots and marsh water. The wagons are split open from within. Among scattered cloth and smashed crates lies a dead carter clutching a jagged black shard. Even now, it pulses with cold.

image.altText: A broken caravan abandoned in a haunted forest

imagePrompt.subject: Two splintered wagons half-submerged in black marsh water, broken crates and scattered cloth, a jagged dark shard visible among the debris

choices.text: Take the shard and follow its pull deeper into the forest
Gather healing herbs before moving on

scene_005b.title: Herbs at the Water's Edge
scene_005b.text: Near the marsh, you spot silverleaf and blood-mint growing between stones. Old Bravoran remedies. You gather what you can before the mist closes in again.

imagePrompt.subject: Pale silver-leafed and deep red-stemmed herbs growing in cracks between wet stones at a dark marsh edge, mist curling close

scene_006.title: The Sunken Ruin
scene_006.text: At last you reach a ring of ancient stones sinking into black earth. Vines coil over weathered carvings older than Corsava itself. In the centre stands a broken arch of godstone, cracked but not dead. Beyond its hollow frame, the air shimmers like oil on water. This is no village ghost story. It is a Veilgate.

imagePrompt.subject: Ring of lichen-covered standing stones tilting into black earth, cracked obsidian arch at centre with shimmering distorted air inside its frame, no figures

choices.text: Use the lantern charm to attempt a warding seal
choices.conditionFailMessage: You lack any proper warding tool.

choices.text: Drive the godstone shard into the broken arch
choices.conditionFailMessage: You need something linked to the Veilgate itself.

scene_007.title: The Gate is Quieted
scene_007.text: You raise the charm and speak the words etched upon it. The clearing grows still. One by one, the ghost lights gutter out. The cracked arch groans, then hardens into lifeless stone. At dawn, the mist begins to thin over Bravora. The villagers will call it a miracle. You know it was only a temporary mercy, but for now the road is safe again.

imagePrompt.subject: Cracked stone arch standing inert and dark in a clearing at grey dawn, mist beginning to disperse, all lights extinguished

scene_008.title: The Wound is Bound
scene_008.text: You press the godstone shard into the fractured arch. For a heartbeat the ruin screams. Then the shimmer collapses inward, as though the air itself has been stitched shut. The effort leaves your hands numb and your thoughts haunted by whispers, but the Veilgate is bound. Somewhere beyond sight, something has noticed you.

imagePrompt.subject: Cracked obsidian arch with a dark shard driven into its split centre, the shimmering air inside collapsing to a single black point

scene_009.title: Beyond the Veil
scene_009.text: You step into a world that is and is not the forest. The trees are twisted into impossible shapes, and distant lights drift like souls at sea. A shadow moves toward you across the silver marsh, wearing the face of one of the missing merchants. Its mouth opens too wide.

imagePrompt.subject: Mirror-world forest with impossibly bent black trees over a silver reflective marsh, a tall shadow-figure in the distance bearing a human face with a jaw unhinged too wide

choices.text: Stand and fight the thing wearing a dead man's face
choices.conditionFailMessage: You have no weapon and no hope of surviving the attack.

choices.text: Flee back through the gate while you still can

scene_010.title: Lost Between Worlds
scene_010.text: You wound the creature, but the Afterworld is not a place where courage alone is enough. The marsh rises around your legs like hands, and the lights close over you. In Bravora, the villagers will one day speak of another lantern in the trees.

imagePrompt.subject: Figure sinking to the waist in silver marsh water, ghostly lights descending to encircle them, dark shapeless sky above

scene_011.title: The Road Remains Cursed
scene_011.text: You throw yourself back through the Veilgate as the clearing erupts with shrieking wind. The ruin falls silent, but not sealed. You escape with your life and enough truth to warn the villagers away, yet the mist in Bravora will claim more souls before anyone dares return. Some evils are discovered, not defeated.

imagePrompt.subject: Lone cloaked figure scrambling away from a stone ruin at night, wind-bent grass and leaves swirling around them, the ruin dark and silent behind

scene_death.title: Claimed by the Mist
scene_death.text: Your strength fails you in the dark between the trees. By morning there is no trace of you on the road into Bravora, only drifting mist and the faint glow of distant lanterns.

imagePrompt.subject: Empty forest road vanishing into absolute white mist, faint amber pinpricks of lantern light deep within, no footprints, no figure
